prompt: A cinematic high-fantasy illustration of a gigantic crimson dragon and a regal female dragon knight standing together on a rocky mountain ridge under a bright pale-blue daytime sky. The dragon dominates the frame, coiled behind and around the warrior, with 2 long sweeping golden-brown horns, a dense windswept mane of fiery red and copper hair, layered red scales with metallic sheen, a long snarling snout, sharp exposed teeth, 2 thin whiskers curling outward from the muzzle, and a fierce intelligent eye staring toward the viewer. Its back is lined with a row of sharp dorsal spines, and its massive body curves across the entire background, emphasizing scale and power. In front of the dragon stands a dragon knight queen, a tall armored woman in ornate red, black, and gold battle attire, facing forward in a heroic stance. She has red hair styled long and flowing, partially tied up, and wears elaborate engraved plate armor with decorated pauldrons, gauntlets, a fitted breastplate, and a long layered gown-like armored skirt with intricate gold filigree. A rich crimson cape drapes behind her and catches the wind. She holds 1 unsheathed sword lowered at her side, while a second blade or dagger is visible at her waist, giving the composition exactly 2 visible weapons. The palette is dominated by scarlet, burgundy, copper, and antique gold, with dramatic sunlight, detailed textures, ultra-fine scales, polished metal, and flowing fabric. Composition is epic and centered, low-angle, full-body warrior in the foreground with the dragon’s head filling the left side and its coiled body arcing across the upper and right background. Style: ultra-detailed fantasy concept art, majestic, heroic, painterly realism, sharp focus, high contrast, volumetric light, premium game key art quality.
